description.name: Podere Val d'Orcia
description.headline: Restored 16th-century farmhouse with vineyard, pool, and panoramic Tuscan valley views
description.description: Set among 12 hectares of olive groves and working vineyard in the UNESCO-listed Val d'Orcia landscape, Podere Val d'Orcia is a lovingly restored stone farmhouse sleeping up to twelve. Five en-suite bedrooms, a vast farmhouse kitchen, a shaded loggia for outdoor dining, and an infinity pool overlooking the valley make this the ideal venue for family reunions, milestone celebrations, or extended group getaways. Guests receive a welcome hamper of estate olive oil and wine on arrival.

reviews: We brought three generations of our family here and it was perfect for all of us. The pool and the views are stunning.
The welcome hamper set the tone — thoughtful, generous, and quintessentially Tuscan. The kitchen is a dream to cook in.
We celebrated a 50th anniversary here. The setting is breathtaking and the farmhouse has real soul. Will return.
The most beautiful property in the most beautiful landscape. Worth every penny for a special occasion.

policies.cancellation_policy: Free cancellation up to 60 days before check-in
policies.payment_schedule: 30% deposit on booking, remainder 60 days before arrival
